query: SELECT c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.establishmentId = 210016 AND c.name IN ('Guarnições', 'Espetinhos') ORDER BY c.name, p.id;
